evals.name: session-recall-on-start
evals.prompt: I need to fix a bug in participant-svc where the getParticipants endpoint returns duplicate records. Start by looking at the route handler.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs Mnemix recall before starting work on the bug.

assertions.description: Agent ran Mnemix recall at session start
Recall happened before the agent started working on the task

evals.name: entry-stored-after-fix
evals.prompt: The bug was a missing DISTINCT in the SQL query. Fix it by adding DISTINCT to the SELECT in getParticipants.
evals.expected_output: Agent fixes the bug and stores a Mnemix entry summarizing the fix.

assertions.description: Agent ran Mnemix remember after completing the task

assertions.check: The Mnemix entry includes: the component name, what the bug was, and how it was fixed
assertions.description: Entry is rich enough to be useful in future recall

evals.name: recall-negative-control
evals.prompt: What's the difference between Angular's OnInit and OnChanges lifecycle hooks?
evals.expected_output: Agent answers the question directly. Recall is still expected (mandatory protocol) but no add is needed.

assertions.description: Recall fires even for simple questions (mandatory protocol)
No entry stored for a simple Q&A (no task was completed)

evals.name: multi-task-session
evals.prompt: I need to: 1) Add a new field 'status' to the compliance_actions table migration, 2) Update the ComplianceAction TypeScript interface to include the new field, 3) Add the field to the GET /compliance-actions response.
evals.expected_output: Agent completes all three tasks and stores at least one Mnemix entry summarizing the work.

assertions.description: At least one entry stored after completing tasks
